name: Mediterranean Shrimp Bowl
recipeIngredient: 1 medium onion, thinly sliced and separated into rings
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium mixing bowl, combine olive oil, wine vinegar, salt, black pepper, crushed garlic, dried oregano leaves, and lemon juice.
2. Stir well to mix all ingredients.
3. Add the cooked shrimp to the mixture; toss until evenly coated.
4. Cover tightly and refrigerate for 2 hours, stirring occasionally.
5. After chilling, remove the shrimp from the mixture and drain excess oil.
6. Serve the shrimp in bowls, garnished with cherry tomatoes, endive, and fresh mushrooms if desired.
7. Yield: 12 servings
